mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, file_path, file_name, file_type, file_size, sort_order, created_at FROM product_files WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_files WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_files (product_id, file_path, file_name, file_type, file_size, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
